name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-10
title: Test fixtures wastefully repeat full feature.json setup in 30+ tests
description: test-tdd-step.py, test-context.py, test-drift-check.py each redefine the same 'fix' helper that builds a full feature.json fixture with nested owner/contract/deprecation/status. The fixture shape is duplicated and drifted from real schema (see related deprecation_criterion bug). Extract a shared fixture helper into a tests/_fixtures.py (or similar) and have it produce a feature.json matching the current canonical shape declared in spec/contract.
